boundary: BOUNDARY := not (geometry supplied or tensor symmetry verified or covariant conservation verified or Killing condition verified or obligation discharged or candidate accepted)

required_geometry_inputs.requirement: explicit bounded spacetime region with declared boundary
coordinate charts or atlas covering SupportCandidateB0
inverse satisfying g_candidate^{mu rho} g_candidate_{rho nu} = delta^mu_nu
connection acting on tensors over SupportCandidateB0
connection coefficients compatible with nabla_candidate in the declared charts
evidence that the total stress-energy tensor is symmetric

killing_condition.interpretation: tau_candidate_nu is Killing with respect to g_candidate and nabla_candidate

current_identity.raw_product_rule: nabla_mu J_E_candidate^mu = (nabla_mu T_total_candidate^{mu nu}) * tau_candidate_nu + T_total_candidate^{mu nu} * nabla_mu tau_candidate_nu
current_identity.symmetric_reduction: T_total_candidate^{mu nu} * nabla_mu tau_candidate_nu = T_total_candidate^{mu nu} * nabla_(mu tau_candidate_nu)
current_identity.general_conservation_condition: (nabla_mu T_total_candidate^{mu nu}) * tau_candidate_nu + T_total_candidate^{mu nu} * nabla_(mu tau_candidate_nu) = 0
current_identity.sufficient_route: nabla_mu T_total_candidate^{mu nu} = 0 and nabla_(mu tau_candidate_nu) = 0

blocked_promotions: geometry input contract -> tensor symmetry verified
geometry input contract -> covariant conservation verified
geometry input contract -> Killing condition verified
geometry input contract -> current conservation verified
geometry input contract -> acceptance obligation discharged
non_claims: does not supply an inverse metric
does not prove the Killing equation
does not prove covariant stress-energy conservation
does not verify the current identity
does not establish E = m c^3 as an energy law
next_weakest_point: Supply one bounded SupportCandidateB0 region-definition candidate without supplying or verifying metric data.
